reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, cuenta con un área de descanso excelente y muy grande. Tiene baños, Full YPF con agua caliente y todo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, with a large, spacious rest area. It has bathrooms, a full YPF system with hot water, and everything.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A classic! Great coffee; great snacks. I love it, it's always my stop on Route 2.

reviews.comment:
Mala atencion. El lugar descuidado y sucio por ser del ACA. cuando pague el cajero no me hizo el descuento del 10% porque según el, no tenía sistema. Señores del ACA  se deben fijar bien a quien le dan la consecion de su nombre.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. The place is neglected and dirty, as is typical for an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). When I paid, the cashier didn't apply the 10% discount because, according to him, the system was down. ACA officials should be more careful about who they grant the concession for their name.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMUpla2lnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala la parrilla. Pedí lomo, lo cobraron $360, eran dos fetas de cuadril casi hervidas, le pregunté a la moza si había un error y me confirmo que ese es el "lomo". Muy feo, lo único que vale la pena son las papas fritas, si quieres buscarle algo para rescatar. Me sentí estafada.

(Translated by Google)
The grill was terrible. I ordered sirloin steak, they charged me $360, but it was just two slices of rump that were practically boiled. I asked the waitress if there was a mistake and she confirmed that this was the "sirloin." It was awful. The only thing worth ordering were the fries, if you're looking for anything redeeming about it. I felt ripped off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMU9HMWtBRRAB
